subject: [RFC PATCH 2/9 v2] mm/memory-tiers: Introduce toptier utility functions

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch introduces two utility functions, get_toptier_nodemask() and mt_scale_by_toptier(), to simplify the calculation of memory limits in tier-aware systems. The functions scale memory limits by the ratio of toptier capacity to total system capacity, ensuring that all cgroups are limited to their fair share of toptier memory. For single-node or single-tier systems, the scaling operation is a no-op. The patch also extends the existing node_is_toptier check to return a nodemask of all N_MEMORY nodes living on toptier.
